claims.statement: The 60% primary / 40% cooperating palace weight split (and its 20/20 or 40/0 sub-splits) is an engineering hypothesis, not a classical formula.
claims.runtimeImplication: No change to production weights; documents existing V0.8 behavior as non-doctrinal.

claims.statement: Across the full 100x12 corpus, palace-level (±8) and axis-level (±8) raw clamps never actually trigger (0% clamp rate on 7,200 domain-observations), so the configured clamp bounds are currently inert under real chart data.
claims.runtimeImplication: No production change; flags the clamp bounds as a candidate for review only if V0.9 adds meaningful new point mass.
claims.notes: Directly measured by the V0.8 foundation audit.

claims.statement: Annual-layer matched evidence carries a net-negative weighted mass ratio (0.70 positive/negative) while natal-layer evidence sitting inside annual-configured palaces carries a net-positive ratio (1.84) and is identical every year for a given chart, anchoring intra-year and year-over-year scores near the same point.
claims.runtimeImplication: No production change; root-cause evidence for failed distribution-spread gates. Numeric natal reweighting remains a future engineering candidate parameter, not doctrine.
claims.notes: Audit observation only — not doctrinal evidence by itself. See also CLM-AAV09-023.

claims.statement: Twelve Calculation-Core-supported annual stars (Lưu Đào Hoa, Lưu Hồng Loan, Lưu Hỷ Thần, Lưu Kiếp Sát, Lưu Long Đức, Lưu Nguyệt Đức, Lưu Phúc Đức, Lưu Thiên Đức, Lưu Thiên Hỷ, Lưu Thiên Mã, Lưu Văn Khúc, Lưu Văn Xương) are emitted by Calculation Core in 100% of the corpus (1,200/1,200 chart-years) but are referenced by zero scoring rules in the current V0.8 registry.
claims.runtimeImplication: Adding scoring rules for these 12 stars is not blocked by Calculation Core capability. Each star still requires individual adjudication (see star-domain-policy and CLM-AAV09-019–030).
claims.notes: Directly measured by the V0.8 foundation audit.

claims.statement: Lưu Đào Hoa should carry fixed positive romance-domain polarity for numeric Annual Axes scoring.
claims.runtimeImplication: Must not enable a production or candidate numeric rule from this claim alone; CONTRA-AAV09-001 adjudicates context-dependent.
claims.notes: Retained as one pole of the historical contradiction. Tân Biên §3.36 does not support fixed positive numeric polarity.

claims.statement: Lưu Đào Hoa should carry fixed negative romance-domain polarity for numeric Annual Axes scoring.
claims.runtimeImplication: Must not enable a production or candidate numeric rule from this claim alone; CONTRA-AAV09-001 adjudicates context-dependent.
claims.notes: Retained as the opposing pole. Tân Biên §3.36 describes mixed/conditional character rather than fixed negative polarity.

claims.statement: Of the twelve Core-emitted-but-unreferenced annual stars, only Lưu Thiên Mã is listed in Tân Biên §4 as an explicit annual Lưu động star with annual placement and qualitative effect; the other eleven lack school-manual annual Lưu động listing and are not candidate-eligible for numeric Annual Axes scoring from this foundation pass.
locators: SRC-AA-V09-TAN-BIEN-1956§4 intro Lưu động list (Thái Tuế, Tang Môn, Bạch Hổ, Thiên Khốc, Thiên Hư, Lộc Tồn, Kình Dương, Đà La, Thiên Mã)
claims.runtimeImplication: Future candidates may include Lưu Thiên Mã only from this set unless additional annual Lưu doctrine is verified for other identities.
claims.notes: Replaces the prior low-confidence engineering hypothesis that all eleven non-Đào-Hoa stars were individually candidate-eligible.

claims.statement: Lưu Đại Hao has no verified annual placement formula; Calculation Core's Bác Sĩ cycle producer (addLuGroup) is natal-only and does not emit an annual identity.
claims.runtimeImplication: Must not enable a production rule. Confirmed zero corpus emissions (capability-coverage.v0.8.json).

claims.statement: Lưu Tiểu Hao has no verified annual placement formula; Calculation Core's Bác Sĩ cycle producer is natal-only.
claims.runtimeImplication: Must not enable a production rule. Confirmed zero corpus emissions.

claims.statement: Lưu Phục Binh has no verified annual placement formula; Calculation Core's Bác Sĩ cycle producer is natal-only.
claims.runtimeImplication: Must not enable a production rule. Confirmed zero corpus emissions.

claims.statement: Lưu Tuần has no verified annual placement formula; Calculation Core's void-star producer (addVoidStars) only constructs natal Tuần/Triệt.
claims.runtimeImplication: Must not enable a production rule. Confirmed zero corpus emissions.

claims.statement: Lưu Triệt has no verified annual placement formula; Calculation Core's void-star producer only constructs natal Tuần/Triệt.
claims.runtimeImplication: Must not enable a production rule. Confirmed zero corpus emissions.

claims.statement: Lưu Thái Tuế functions purely as a magnitude prominence multiplier (×1.25) and never creates signed direction from zero.
claims.runtimeImplication: No production change; documents existing V0.8 behavior as non-doctrinal.

claims.statement: Across the full corpus, the Thái Tuế ×1.25 multiplier applies in 21.18% of domain-observations, but never once co-occurs with an axis-level clamp.
claims.runtimeImplication: No production change.
claims.notes: Directly measured by the V0.8 foundation audit.

claims.statement: Nam Phái school-manual doctrine treats miếu/hãm (and related đắc/hãm language) as conditional modifiers of star expression for natal main stars and for several auxiliaries; annual Lưu Thiên Mã doctrine additionally conditions favorable reading on meeting Lộc and unfavorable reading on Tuần/Triệt án ngữ. No source in this pack authorizes a numeric dignity multiplier for Annual Axes.
locators: SRC-AA-V09-TAN-BIEN-1956§3 miếu/hãm essays for main and auxiliary stars
SRC-AA-V09-TAN-BIEN-1956§4.4 Lưu Thiên Mã conditional co-presence (Lộc favorable; Tuần/Triệt unfavorable)
claims.runtimeImplication: Policy foundation only: natal mains = conditional; annual auxiliaries = conditional/optional modifier; annual Tứ Hóa = insufficient evidence for new dignity gate beyond current V0.8; no numeric multipliers in this PR.
claims.notes: Replaces the prior unresolved engineering-only dignity claim.

claims.statement: The current domain-palace mapping's shared cooperating palaces (e.g. Phúc Đức feeding both family and wealth) are engineering hypotheses with no classical source found in this pack, but the full-corpus audit's low maximum inter-axis correlation (0.325) shows this sharing is not currently producing redundant axes.
claims.runtimeImplication: No production change; rules out shared-palace mapping as the explanation for low intra-year spread.

claims.statement: Annual Tứ Hóa (Lưu Hóa Lộc/Quyền/Khoa/Kỵ) are treated as temporally distinct star identities from natal/decadal Tứ Hóa, matching only annual-scoped rules; this exact-identity policy is production behavior with engineering-hypothesis provenance, not a classical claim.
claims.runtimeImplication: No production change; documents existing V0.8 behavior.

claims.statement: Tiểu Hạn (cung nhập hạn / tiểu hạn một năm) is a general annual frame for reading the year: Bản Mệnh relates to the entered hạn palace, and annual Lưu động stars are read in that yearly context. Restricting Tiểu Hạn numeric cooperation to the health domain alone is an engineering simplification, not school-manual doctrine.
locators: SRC-AA-V09-TAN-BIEN-1956§2.3 Liên hệ giữa Bản Mệnh và cung nhập hạn (Tiểu hạn một năm)
SRC-AA-V09-TAN-BIEN-1956§4 intro (lưu niên tiểu hạn + Lưu động)
claims.runtimeImplication: No production mapping change in this PR. Candidate evaluation may test general-frame or domain-specific Tiểu Hạn mappings as engineering parameters.
claims.notes: Decision: general annual context supported. Health-only V0.8 mapping remains engineering until a later candidate chooses parameters.

claims.statement: Lưu Thiên Mã is an explicit Nam Phái annual Lưu động star: placed from the year branch, shares Thiên Mã character (movement/change), and activates movement or change related to the palace where it sits during the Tiểu hạn year.
locators: SRC-AA-V09-TAN-BIEN-1956§4 intro (Thiên Mã in explicit Lưu động list)
SRC-AA-V09-TAN-BIEN-1956§4.4 Lưu Thiên Mã placement table and palace-linked movement paraphrase
claims.runtimeImplication: Candidate-eligible for a bounded V0.9 numeric experiment on career/social (and palace-context) movement activation. Numeric point values remain engineering hypotheses.
claims.notes: Partial source access; locators are section+scan-page based, not invented page fiction.

claims.statement: Natal qualitative essays in Tân Biên §3 describe Văn Xương/Văn Khúc (literary), Hồng Loan/Thiên Hỷ/Hỷ Thần (joy/romance), Thiên Đức/Nguyệt Đức/Long Đức/Phúc Đức (virtue/protection), and Kiếp Sát (calamity), but §4 does not list corresponding annual Lưu identities among the explicit Lưu động stars.
claims.runtimeImplication: Those eleven Core-emitted annual identities remain interpretive-only for Annual Axes scoring pending verified annual Lưu doctrine beyond Core emission.
claims.notes: Does not deny Core emission; denies school-manual annual scoring authorization.

claims.statement: Social (Nô Bộc 0.6 + Thiên Di 0.4) and romance (Phu Thê 0.6 + Tử Tức 0.4) two-palace asymmetries relative to the three-contributor pattern used elsewhere are engineering simplifications; this pass found no Nam Phái school-manual requirement to add Huynh Đệ, Mệnh, or Phúc Đức as numeric cooperating palaces for those domains.
locators: SRC-AA-V09-TAN-BIEN-1956 (no verified numeric domain-weight table located)
claims.runtimeImplication: No production mapping change. Acceptable engineering simplification until a source-backed remapping appears.
claims.notes: Reviewed potential cooperating palaces; none included without source support.

claims.statement: Đào Hoa (and by shared essay Hồng Loan) is described with mixed/context-dependent character: attraction, romance, and joy language together with flirtation/scandal risk under certain combinations — not a fixed positive or fixed negative fortune polarity.
locators: SRC-AA-V09-TAN-BIEN-1956§3.36 Đào Hoa / Hồng Loan essay (paraphrase only)
claims.runtimeImplication: Lưu Đào Hoa remains excluded from fixed-polarity numeric candidates; interpretive-only / context-dependent.
claims.notes: Adjudicates CONTRA-AAV09-001 as context-dependent. Exact scandal conditions in the essay are combination-dependent; this pack does not invent a full activation matrix.

claims.statement: When reading annual hạn, Nam Phái school-manual practice requires attending both fixed (natal) stars already present in the palace and annual Lưu động stars — natal stars are palace content activated by the annual frame, not merely decorative background.
locators: SRC-AA-V09-TAN-BIEN-1956§4 intro (sao tĩnh/cố định already in cung vs sao Lưu động)
claims.runtimeImplication: Qualitative policy supports natal participation in annual palace reading. Numeric natal weight reduction remains a future engineering candidate parameter (see CLM-AAV09-003 audit observation).
claims.notes: Separates source-backed qualitative policy from audit mass ratios and from future numeric hypotheses.

claims.statement: Lưu Đào Hoa annual identity is emitted by Calculation Core but is not listed in Tân Biên §4 Lưu động stars; combined with context-dependent natal Đào Hoa character, it is not candidate-eligible for fixed-polarity numeric scoring.
claims.runtimeImplication: Research decision: remain-disputed / interpretive-only for numeric axes; exclude from candidate shapes.
